finding: `team start` could create a team runtime run even when normal task claim dependency gates would reject the task.
expectedBehavior: Team Agents start should share claim-admission parity with normal task lifecycle and fail closed before writing runtime state.
evidenceOrRepro: Dogfood on `TASK-APO-0029`: `next --claim` was blocked by missing dependency `TASK-APO-0028`, while `team start` still wrote `team-4d7bc0109ef7`.
